title: Looking for Financial Analyst at AU Small Finance Bank Capital India
company: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at AU Small Finance Bank Capital India
jsonLd.description:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AU Small Finance Bank Capital India:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank Capital India!
